buildingDept.name: City of Pacific Grove Building Division
buildingDept.address: 300 Forest Avenue, 2nd Floor, Pacific Grove, CA 93950

fireAgency.name: Monterey Fire Department
fireAgency.planCheckPath: Submit deferred submittal permit + fire sprinkler/alarm plans to fireprevention@monterey.gov. 10–14 business day review.
fireAgency.notes: Pacific Grove Fire Department merged into Monterey City FD in December 2008. MFD handles all fire prevention plan review and inspections for Pacific Grove.
